trigger.description: A context stream consumer observes a header and item prefix but the stream ends before a trailer, error, or cancelled terminal frame arrives.
setup_commands: ee remember 'Partial stream terminal fixture.' --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule --json
ee context 'Partial stream terminal fixture' --workspace . --stream --format json | sed '$d' > /tmp/ee-partial-context-stream.ndjson

expected_emission.repair_string: Retry `ee context --stream`; treat the partial stream as incomplete.
